transcript: Speaker A (AI Robot): ಇವತ್ತು ನಾನು confidence ಜೊತೆ English ಮಾತಾಡಬೇಕು. [Today I should speak English confidently.] Speaker B (Human): Today I should speak English confidently. Speaker A: ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ English easy ಆಗ್ತದೆ. [English becomes easy with daily practice.] Speaker B: English becomes easy with daily practice. Speaker A: ನಾನು ಹೊಸ ಜನರ ಜೊತೆ English ನಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡಲು ಇಷ್ಟ ಪಡ್ತೀನಿ. [I like speaking in English with new people.] Speaker B: I like speaking in English with new people. Speaker A: ತಪ್ಪು ಮಾಡಿದ್ರು ನಾನು ಮಾತಾಡೋದನ್ನ ನಿಲ್ಲಿಸೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [Even if I make mistakes, I will not stop speaking.] Speaker B: Even if I make mistakes, I will not stop speaking. Speaker A: MySivi app ನಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಹೀಗೆ ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಾ English ಕಲಿಬಹುದು. ಡೈಲಿ ಜಸ್ಟ್ 10-15 ಮಿನಿಟ್ಸ್ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಸಾಕು. ಅದು ಅಲ್ಲದೆ ಇದು ಈಗ ಕೇವಲ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಯಿಂದ ಸ್ಟಾರ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ಒಂದು ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ MySivi ಮೂಲಕ English ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. MySivi ಡೌನ್‌ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ, ಇಂದೇ ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಸ್ಪೀಕಿಂಗ್ ಸ್ಟಾರ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡಿ. [In MySivi app, you can learn English by speaking with me in Kannada like this. Just 10-15 minutes of daily practice is enough. Moreover, you can start this now for just one rupee. That's why one crore people have learned English through MySivi. Download MySivi and start confident English speaking today.]
on_screen_text: ಇವತ್ತು ನಾನು confidence ಜೊತೆ English ಮಾತಾಡಬೇಕು [Today I should speak English confidently], Today I should speak English confidently, ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ English easy ಆಗ್ತದೆ [English becomes easy with daily practice], English becomes easy with daily practice, ನಾನು ಹೊಸ ಜನರ ಜೊತೆ English ನಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡಲು ಇಷ್ಟ ಪಡ್ತೀನಿ [I like speaking in English with new people], I like speaking in English with new people, ತಪ್ಪು ಮಾಡಿದ್ರು ನಾನು ಮಾತಾಡೋದನ್ನ ನಿಲ್ಲಿಸೋದಿಲ್ಲ [Even if I make mistakes, I will not stop speaking], Even if I make mistakes, I will not stop speaking, MySivi, ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡುತ್ತಾ english ಕಲಿಬಹುದು [Learn English while speaking in Kannada], MySivi Premium, 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1, 1,200 learners purchased today, 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access, 10M+ Downloads, english ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದಾರೆ [learned English], Master Spoken Eng, Sharpen your Englis 1-on-1 calls. Try MyS, MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An AI robot and a human host demonstrate learning English through translation practice in Kannada. The ad promotes the MySivi app, highlighting its 1-rupee premium trial and daily 10-15 minute practice routine. Viewers are urged to download the app to start speaking English confidently.
